items.title: Targeting kinase ITK treats autoimmune arthritis via orchestrating T cell differentiation and function.
The kinase ITK controls a Ca-mediated switch that balances Th17 and T cell differentiation.
TNF-alpha signals through ITK-Akt-mTOR to drive CD4 T cell metabolic reprogramming, which is dysregulated in rheumatoid arthritis.

open_targets.reason: Open Targets GraphQL API requires a POST-capable HTTP client; no such MCP connector was available in this session. Wire via external_evidence_cache.fetch_open_targets when deployed with direct network access.
